title: Steel General Trading
content:
Fabtech Group of Companies is one of the largest, interdisciplinary and technically capable heavy Engineering & Industrial Fabrication Companies in the Middle East. Founded in 1994, based on the vision of its founder – Dr. Harry Moraes, Fabtech has grown dynamically, gained enormous wealth of experience & become a benchmark by being consistent in exceeding clients’ expectations in both manufacturing and product excellence. Headquartered in Dubai with its branches serving clients all across the globe, Fabtech caters a comprehensive range of services to the oil, gas, power, water and other process industries through its multiple specialist divisions under one umbrella.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
